summary: While orthodontistry offers an exceptional work-life balance and predictable daytime hours that align with your wellbeing goals, the cognitive demands of the role present a significant mismatch for your professional strengths. The position requires advanced proficiency in physics, geometry, and complex 3D spatial reasoning, which directly conflicts with your preference for protocol-driven work and your struggles with mathematical deduction. Furthermore, the high-paced requirement to manage up to 60 patients daily would likely lead to mental exhaustion and stress, negating the benefits of the sustainable schedule.
